scene_input.scene_summary: Abū Bakr buys the slave from ʿĀmir ibn Fuhayrah and frees them.
scene_input.key_visual_action: Abū Bakr holding the slave's hand, with a smile

schema_output.scene_summary: Abū Bakr buys the slave from ʿĀmir ibn Fuhayrah and frees them.
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 65
schema_output.moral_lesson: The importance of freeing slaves and treating all people with kindness and respect.

characters.name: Abū Bakr
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

characters.name: ʿĀmir ibn Fuhayrah
characters.appearance: medium build, wearing a plain brown woolen cloak and a white cloth head covering

characters.name: Slave
characters.appearance: young woman, fully and modestly dressed in a simple tunic and headscarf, with a gentle expression

schema_output.narrative_text: Abū Bakr bought the slave from ʿĀmir ibn Fuhayrah and set them free. He smiled with joy as he held their hand.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. Bustling 7th century Makkah market scene with ancient wooden stalls and merchants in traditional clothing. Late afternoon sunlight casts warm rays across the market, with a few palm trees providing shade. In the center of the market, a man in a flowing white thobe with a deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders stands facing a merchant wearing a plain brown woolen cloak and a white cloth head covering. The man in the green cloak holds the hand of a young woman in a simple tunic and headscarf, who looks up at him with a gentle expression. The merchant stands with his arms crossed, looking on with a neutral expression. Soft warm golden light, lively and joyful mood. Medium shot at eye level. Warm sand, cream, and golden palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
_safety_changes: 'man in a green cloak' instead of 'prophet'
